specFidelityNotes: Diff f5f2877a vs origin/main@985ca86b on feature/issue-471-analytics-coverage. Implements P2-9-9 coverage reporter: calendar-day buckets for revenue/live/revenue_live/product, exact-fraction gates (≥95% combined revenue+live, ≥90% product), exit_ready boolean, missing_dates merged with AnalyticsBackfillPartitionsRepo incomplete rows (#464), JSON+markdown CLI subcommand, ADR-029 scope notes (Ads/Impressions out, GMV≠Net Revenue). All issue ACs addressed in unit tests; no Partner HTTP.

convention_notes.note: BudgetExhaustedError remains imported but was dropped from __all__ when coverage symbols were added; direct import still works.
